response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks junior-level alignment: they are a senior with 10+ years of experience, primarily using TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, with only peripheral Java exposure; they have basic German (not fluent), which is a hard requirement for client-facing roles in Germany; and their career trajectory is far beyond the entry-level scope of the role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and architectures
Strong contributions to open-source and community education (workshops, talks)
Demonstrated agile practices and DevOps infrastructure expertise
concerns: Far exceeds junior level — over 10 years of senior experience
German proficiency is only basic, but fluency is required for client collaboration
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang; Java experience is minimal and unverified
